channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [BHARATFORG] Bharat Forge Ltd Approves Unsecured Rupee Term Loan of Rs. 8,000 Million
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Bharat Forge Ltd's Investment Committee has approved the raising of funds by way of an unsecured rupee term loan. The Committee, in its meeting held on March 4, 2026, has approved availing of an unsecured rupee term loan up to an amount of Rs. 8,000,000,000/- (Rupees Eight Thousand Million Only). This approval is within the overall limit of Rs. 20,000 Million (Rupees Twenty Thousand Million Only) approved by the Board for fund-raising through term loan, non-convertible debentures or any other debt instruments. The Committee meeting commenced at 4:00 P.M. and concluded at 4:30 P.M.

  • Bharat Forge Ltd's Investment Committee has approved the raising of funds by way of an unsecured rupee term loan.
  • The approved loan amount is up to Rs. 8,000,000,000/- (Rupees Eight Thousand Million Only).
  • This approval is within the overall limit of Rs. 20,000 Million (Rupees Twenty Thousand Million Only) approved by the Board.
  • The Committee has the authority to evaluate, finalise and take actions for fund-raising.
  • The Committee meeting was held on March 4, 2026, from 4:00 P.M. to 4:30 P.M.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BHARAT FORGE LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [ECOM] Accedere Ltd Strengthens DPDP Compliance Strategy with Consent Management Platform and AI Expertise
item.description:
Accedere Ltd is emphasizing its integrated Consent Management System (CMS) within its AI-powered Cyber GRC platform, Controllo.ai, to help organizations meet evolving DPDP obligations efficiently and transparently. The new law requires organizations to ensure consent is freely given, specific, informed, and unambiguous, with consent records auditable and demonstrable. Controllo.ai's CMS captures and manages user consent, maintains tamper-proof consent logs, enables real-time consent withdrawal and updates, provides dashboards for compliance monitoring, and aligns consent governance with broader cyber and privacy GRC frameworks. Accedere plans to apply for formal recognition and approval for its Consent Management Platform in line with India’s DPDP regulatory framework. The company's leadership is backed by deep cyber and privacy GRC expertise, positioning Controllo.ai as a comprehensive DPDP compliance enabler for Indian organizations.

  • Accedere Ltd strengthens its DPDP compliance strategy with an integrated Consent Management System (CMS) in Controllo.ai.
  • Controllo.ai's CMS captures and manages user consent, maintains tamper-proof consent logs, and enables real-time consent withdrawal and updates.
  • Accedere plans to seek approval as a Consent Management Platform under India’s DPDP regulatory framework.
  • Accedere's leadership has deep cyber and privacy GRC expertise, advising Fortune 100 enterprises and implementing privacy programs.
  • Accedere positions Controllo.ai as a comprehensive DPDP compliance enabler for Indian organizations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: E.COM INFOTECH (I) LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [MESON] Quest Flow Controls Ltd Secures ¥ 9,001,594.87 Order from GOVT. OF INDIA UNDERTAKING - MINISTRY OF DEFENCE
item.description:
Quest Flow Controls Ltd (Formerly Known as Meson Valves India Limited) has announced receipt of a purchase order from the Prestigious client GOVT. OF INDIA UNDERTAKING - MINISTRY OF DEFENCE for supply of Naval & Critical valves including Triple offset butterfly valves. The Order value is ¥ 9,001,594.87/- including GST.

  • Order value is ¥ 9,001,594.87 including GST
  • Prestigious client is GOVT. OF INDIA UNDERTAKING - MINISTRY OF DEFENCE
  • Supply of Naval & Critical valves including Triple offset butterfly valves
  • Order to be executed within 3 months
  • Quest Flow Controls Ltd is a Domestic Entity

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Meson Valves India Ltd | Category: Deals

item.title: [UPL] UPL Ltd Announces Composite Scheme of Arrangement
item.description:
🔥 Trending

UPL Ltd has announced a Composite Scheme of Arrangement amongst UPL Limited, UPL Sustainable Agri Solutions Limited, UPL Global Sustainable Agri Solutions Limited and UPL Crop Protection Holdings Limited. The scheme, which is subject to various approvals and compliances, has been uploaded on the company's website for shareholders' understanding. The board of directors of the company had approved the scheme on February 20, 2026.

  • UPL Ltd has announced a Composite Scheme of Arrangement with UPL Limited, UPL Sustainable Agri Solutions Limited, UPL Global Sustainable Agri Solutions Limited and UPL Crop Protection Holdings Limited.
  • The scheme is subject to various approvals and compliances under the Companies Act, 2013.
  • The company has uploaded the scheme, Joint Valuation Report, Fairness Opinion and FAQs on its website for shareholders' understanding.
  • The board of directors of the company had approved the scheme on February 20, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: UPL Limited | Category: Deals

item.title: [TVVISION] TV Vision Ltd Receives Petition from Punjab National Bank under Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code
item.description:
🔥 Trending

TV Vision Ltd has received a copy of a petition filed by Punjab National Bank (PNB), a Financial Creditor, before the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Mumbai, under section 7 of the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016. The petition alleges an outstanding amount of INR 294,43,49,883.41. This disclosure is considered material and may have an impact on the operations and financial position of the Company. The Company will keep stakeholders informed of any further material developments.

  • TV Vision Ltd has received a petition from Punjab National Bank under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016.
  • The petition alleges an outstanding amount of INR 294,43,49,883.41.
  • The receipt of the petition is considered material and may impact the Company's operations and financial position.
  • The Company will keep stakeholders informed of any further material developments.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TV Vision Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [PRISMX] Prismx Global Ventures Ltd. to Reclassify Promoters in Compliance with SEBI Regulations
item.description:
Prismx Global Ventures Ltd. has announced an Extra Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) to be held on 26th March, 2026, for the reclassification of persons forming part of the Promoter/Promoter group. The reclassification is in compliance with Regulation 30, 34 & 42 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements), Regulations 2015. The EGM will transact the special business of reclassifying certain promoters from 'Promoter & Promoter Group Category' to 'Public Category'. The notice of EGM has been dispatched and will also be made available on the company's website.

  • Prismx Global Ventures Ltd. to hold EGM on 26th March, 2026
  • Reclassification of certain promoters from 'Promoter & Promoter Group Category' to 'Public Category'
  • Compliance with Regulation 30, 34 & 42 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements), Regulations 2015
  • Notice of EGM dispatched and available on company's website
  • Book closure from 20th to 26th March, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Prismx Global Ventures Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [HITKITGLO] Eswara Rao Nandam & Others Acquire Additional 2.24% Stake in Hit Kit Global Solutions Ltd
item.description:
Eswara Rao Nandam, along with Uma Nandam, Vishaal Nandam, and Ajaraya Business Corporation, have acquired an additional 2.24% stake in Hit Kit Global Solutions Ltd. This acquisition is in accordance with Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The acquisition details are provided in the prescribed format.

  • Eswara Rao Nandam and others have acquired an additional 2.24% stake in Hit Kit Global Solutions Ltd.
  • The acquisition is in accordance with Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
  • The total voting rights of the company have increased to 22.24% after the acquisition.
  • The acquisition was made through market purchase.
  • The acquisition details are provided in the prescribed format.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HIT KIT GLOBAL SOLUTIONS LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [TVVISION] TV Vision Ltd Receives Insolvency Petition from Punjab National Bank for INR 294 Crores
item.description:
🔥 Trending

TV Vision Ltd has received a copy of a petition filed by Punjab National Bank (PNB) under section 7 of the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016. The petition alleges an outstanding amount of INR 294,43,49,883.41. This disclosure is considered material and may have an impact on the operations and financial position of the Company. The Company will keep stakeholders informed of any further material developments.

  • TV Vision Ltd has received a petition from Punjab National Bank under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016.
  • The petition alleges an outstanding amount of INR 294,43,49,883.41.
  • The Company is required to disclose this information due to its potential impact on operations and financial position.
  • The Company will keep stakeholders informed of any further material developments.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TV Vision Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [GANDHAR] Gandhar Oil Refinery Receives GST Summons for Certain Type of Transactions
item.description:
Gandhar Oil Refinery (India) Ltd. has received a GST summons issued under Section 70 of the Central Goods and Service Tax Act, 2017. The summons seeks documents/details regarding certain type of transactions. The company has not received the hard copy of the summons yet but has received it through e-mail on 03rd March, 2026. The inquiry is at a nascent stage and the company cannot determine the impact on financial activities in monetary terms at this stage.

  • Gandhar Oil Refinery (India) Ltd. has received a GST summons
  • The summons seeks documents/details regarding certain type of transactions
  • The company has not received the hard copy of the summons yet
  • The inquiry is at a nascent stage
  • The company cannot determine the impact on financial activities in monetary terms at this stage

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Gandhar Oil Refinery (India) Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [LTIM] LTIMindtree Ltd Recognized as Leader in GenAl & Process Automation for Banking by NelsonHall
item.description:
LTIMindtree Ltd (LTM) has been recognized as a Leader in the Overall market segment in the NelsonHall NEAT Evaluation for GenAl & Process Automation in Banking 2025. This recognition positions LTM among the top-performing vendors for their ability to deliver both immediate business impact and long-term innovation capability in GenAl and process automation services for the banking sector. The evaluation highlights LTM's depth of experience in financial services and its focused investments in GenAl, agentic Al, and process automation capabilities delivered through its BlueVerse™ platform.

  • LTM recognized as a Leader in NelsonHall NEAT Evaluation for GenAl & Process Automation in Banking 2025
  • Recognition based on LTM's ability to deliver immediate business impact and long-term innovation capability
  • LTM's strong focus on GenAl, agentic Al, and process automation capabilities
  • LTM's BlueVerse™ platform supports banking clients across various sectors
  • LTM's digital agents dedicated to manage GenAl and process automation services

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LTIMindtree Ltd | Category: Award
